item.title: We're introducing Claude for Teachers: free access to premium Claude capabilities for verified K-12 educators in the US, with a library of teaching skills and a direct connection to evidence-based cur
item.description:
We're introducing Claude for Teachers: free access to premium Claude capabilities for verified K-12 educators in the US, with a library of teaching skills and a direct connection to evidence-based curricula, mapped to academic standards in all 50 states.
https://t.co/5hZZijVPCV https://t.co/5ofG8YL

item.title: We're extending Claude Fable 5 access on all paid plans, as well as keeping Claude Code’s weekly rate limits 50% higher, through July 19.
item.description: We're extending Claude Fable 5 access on all paid plans, as well as keeping Claude Code’s weekly rate limits 50% higher, through July 19.

item.title: There’s hope in hard questions. https://t.co/rDYjqIlH9l
item.description: There’s hope in hard questions. https://t.co/rDYjqIlH9l

item.title:
Introducing a new way to reflect on how you use Claude.
Your monthly recap shows when you use Claude most and what you spent that time working on, with options to set quiet hours and nudges to take b
item.description:
Introducing a new way to reflect on how you use Claude.
Your monthly recap shows when you use Claude most and what you spent that time working on, with options to set quiet hours and nudges to take breaks. Find your dashboard in Settings under Reflect: https://t.co/8QAn47W5rI https://t.co/WzA3JfONl

item.title: We're extending access to Claude Fable 5 on all paid plans through July 12.
item.description: We're extending access to Claude Fable 5 on all paid plans through July 12.

item.title:
Claude Cowork is coming to mobile and web.
Hand Claude a task at your desk and pick up the finished work from your phone. Close the laptop and Claude keeps going.
Beta is rolling out over the next s
item.description:
Claude Cowork is coming to mobile and web.
Hand Claude a task at your desk and pick up the finished work from your phone. Close the laptop and Claude keeps going.
Beta is rolling out over the next several weeks starting with the Max plan, with more plans to follow. https://t.co/W4WrgN9TrG

item.title:
We've put together a short history of how Claude Code came to be, told by the people who built it and the early users who helped make it what it is today.
https://t.co/0gXEPID8lh https://t.co/2qeCVrD
item.description:
We've put together a short history of how Claude Code came to be, told by the people who built it and the early users who helped make it what it is today.
https://t.co/0gXEPID8lh https://t.co/2qeCVrD6Ep

item.title:
Squidsoup is a collective of artists and designers who make immersive experiences with sound, light and space.
We caught up with them before one of their largest projects to date: a live performance
item.description:
Squidsoup is a collective of artists and designers who make immersive experiences with sound, light and space.
We caught up with them before one of their largest projects to date: a live performance with an orchestra at the Southbank Centre in London. https://t.co/8wvgOYfotp

item.title:
A conversation with Boris Cherny and Cat Wu on the path from Claude Code to Claude Tag, and how it spread from engineering to the rest of Anthropic.
Claude Fable 5 is now available in Claude Tag. htt
item.description:
A conversation with Boris Cherny and Cat Wu on the path from Claude Code to Claude Tag, and how it spread from engineering to the rest of Anthropic.
Claude Fable 5 is now available in Claude Tag. https://t.co/8oNM5WaWzj

item.title:
Announcing Built with Claude: Life Sciences, a global virtual hackathon.
Join us and @GladstoneInst for a week of researching and building with Claude Science and Claude Code, with a prize pool of $1
item.description:
Announcing Built with Claude: Life Sciences, a global virtual hackathon.
Join us and @GladstoneInst for a week of researching and building with Claude Science and Claude Code, with a prize pool of $100k in credits. https://t.co/wzrSBHJgeP

item.title: Fable 5 is back. https://t.co/9RTGUCcPHy
item.description: Fable 5 is back. https://t.co/9RTGUCcPHy

item.title:
RT @AnthropicAI: We’ve received notice that the Department of Commerce has lifted export controls on Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5.
We'll be…
item.description:
RT @AnthropicAI: We’ve received notice that the Department of Commerce has lifted export controls on Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5.
We'll be…

item.title:
Introducing Claude Sonnet 5, our most agentic Sonnet yet.
It makes plans, uses tools like browsers and terminals, and runs autonomously at a level that just a few months ago required larger and more
item.description:
Introducing Claude Sonnet 5, our most agentic Sonnet yet.
It makes plans, uses tools like browsers and terminals, and runs autonomously at a level that just a few months ago required larger and more expensive models. https://t.co/UKK8G7ww5h

item.title:
Introducing Claude Science, a new app designed with every stage of research in mind.
Artifacts traced to their code, environments managed on demand, and 60+ optional scientific databases that you ca
item.description:
Introducing Claude Science, a new app designed with every stage of research in mind.
Artifacts traced to their code, environments managed on demand, and 60+ optional scientific databases that you can connect.
Available now in beta. https://t.co/HKhLknxLJO

item.title:
Claude in Microsoft Foundry is now generally available, hosted on Azure.
Azure customers get Claude Opus 4.8 and Claude Haiku 4.5, with Azure authentication, billing, and commitment retirement. https
item.description:
Claude in Microsoft Foundry is now generally available, hosted on Azure.
Azure customers get Claude Opus 4.8 and Claude Haiku 4.5, with Azure authentication, billing, and commitment retirement. https://t.co/4Rz7fa9Bxm

item.title:
Introducing Claude Tag, a new way for teams to work with Claude.
In Slack, Claude joins as a team member with access to the channels and tools you choose. Tag Claude in and delegate tasks to it while
item.description:
Introducing Claude Tag, a new way for teams to work with Claude.
In Slack, Claude joins as a team member with access to the channels and tools you choose. Tag Claude in and delegate tasks to it while you focus on other work. https://t.co/R2C6A5Kcye

item.title:
New in Claude Code: Artifacts.
Interactive pages built from your session, like a PR walkthrough or a living project dashboard, shared with your team at a private link.
Available in beta on Team and
item.description:
New in Claude Code: Artifacts.
Interactive pages built from your session, like a PR walkthrough or a living project dashboard, shared with your team at a private link.
Available in beta on Team and Enterprise plans. https://t.co/0NX9gNCaAs

item.title: New in Claude Design: it stays on brand with your design system across projects, lets you edit directly on the canvas, syncs with Claude Code, and connects to more of the tools you already use. https:
item.description: New in Claude Design: it stays on brand with your design system across projects, lets you edit directly on the canvas, syncs with Claude Code, and connects to more of the tools you already use. https://t.co/MK8YvLP8zV

item.title: RT @ClaudeDevs: As a result of a US government directive, we are suspending access to Claude Fable 5 for all users. You can continue to use…
item.description: RT @ClaudeDevs: As a result of a US government directive, we are suspending access to Claude Fable 5 for all users. You can continue to use…

item.title: Claude Fable 5 has been out for a couple of days. Some projects people have already built with it:
item.description: Claude Fable 5 has been out for a couple of days. Some projects people have already built with it:

item.title:
Michael Truell (@mntruell) fell in love with coding at 12. The company he co-founded, @cursor_ai, went from 15 people to 700 in two years.
Today, over 60% of the Fortune 500 build with its AI coding
item.description:
Michael Truell (@mntruell) fell in love with coding at 12. The company he co-founded, @cursor_ai, went from 15 people to 700 in two years.
Today, over 60% of the Fortune 500 build with its AI coding platform. https://t.co/1UROi02oHJ

item.title:
New from Code with Claude Tokyo: scheduled deployments and environment variables in vaults are in public beta in Claude Managed Agents, and dynamic workflows in Claude Code are generally available.
A
item.description:
New from Code with Claude Tokyo: scheduled deployments and environment variables in vaults are in public beta in Claude Managed Agents, and dynamic workflows in Claude Code are generally available.
Agents now run on a schedule, use your tools securely, and take on bigger jobs. https://t.co/9mTr8T6g

item.title:
Introducing Claude Fable 5: a Mythos-class model that we’ve made safe for general use.
Its capabilities exceed those of any model we’ve ever made generally available. https://t.co/2AvmEjHIX8
item.description:
Introducing Claude Fable 5: a Mythos-class model that we’ve made safe for general use.
Its capabilities exceed those of any model we’ve ever made generally available. https://t.co/2AvmEjHIX8

item.title:
Final stop: Tokyo.
Register to hear directly from the teams behind Claude: https://t.co/SkYZwjK3GS
item.description:
Final stop: Tokyo.
Register to hear directly from the teams behind Claude: https://t.co/SkYZwjK3GS

item.title:
We've doubled usage limits in Claude Cowork for the next month.
Delegate bigger, more complex tasks to Claude. https://t.co/ivHZuaMbZV
item.description:
We've doubled usage limits in Claude Cowork for the next month.
Delegate bigger, more complex tasks to Claude. https://t.co/ivHZuaMbZV

item.title:
Anton Osika (@antonosika) is the co-founder and CEO of @lovable, where anyone can build software through conversation.
His working thesis: the most underrated moat in AI is trust, and earning it take
item.description:
Anton Osika (@antonosika) is the co-founder and CEO of @lovable, where anyone can build software through conversation.
His working thesis: the most underrated moat in AI is trust, and earning it takes craft, care, and obsession. https://t.co/xxGDgonNzS

item.title: We spoke with @BenJames_____ about building things, creativity, and why silly ideas matter. https://t.co/36i6YTbtny
item.description: We spoke with @BenJames_____ about building things, creativity, and why silly ideas matter. https://t.co/36i6YTbtny

item.title:
Interpreting law is one of the oldest jobs in the world. @MaxJunestrand, co-founder and CEO of @WeAreLegora, is bringing it into its next era with Claude.
His bet: every new model release raises the
item.description:
Interpreting law is one of the oldest jobs in the world. @MaxJunestrand, co-founder and CEO of @WeAreLegora, is bringing it into its next era with Claude.
His bet: every new model release raises the tide, and Legora is building the boats for everyone else. https://t.co/EOM8PqALT4

item.title:
Before we ship a new model, these teams try to break it.
They build with it, push it to its limits, and tell us where it falls short. What they find makes the final model better. https://t.co/Q4LD01z
item.description:
Before we ship a new model, these teams try to break it.
They build with it, push it to its limits, and tell us where it falls short. What they find makes the final model better. https://t.co/Q4LD01zIIc

item.title:
Introducing Claude Opus 4.8: it builds on Opus 4.7 with sharper judgment, more honesty about its own progress, and the ability to work independently for longer than its predecessors.
Available today
item.description:
Introducing Claude Opus 4.8: it builds on Opus 4.7 with sharper judgment, more honesty about its own progress, and the ability to work independently for longer than its predecessors.
Available today at the same price. https://t.co/EufxL7T1kb

item.title:
Michele Catasta (@pirroh) is President and Head of AI @replit, the platform where anyone can build software in natural language.
At 16, he set out to make software open to everyone. Today, over 50 mi
item.description:
Michele Catasta (@pirroh) is President and Head of AI @replit, the platform where anyone can build software in natural language.
At 16, he set out to make software open to everyone. Today, over 50 million people are building on Replit with Claude: https://t.co/KqZ3xkmU7P

item.title:
New in the Claude Marketplace: @augmentcode, @boltdotnew, @coderabbitai, @hebbia, and @WeAreLegora.
Apply your existing Anthropic spend commitment toward their Claude-powered products.
Learn more: h
item.description:
New in the Claude Marketplace: @augmentcode, @boltdotnew, @coderabbitai, @hebbia, and @WeAreLegora.
Apply your existing Anthropic spend commitment toward their Claude-powered products.
Learn more: https://t.co/J3Sdsg2lU6 https://t.co/gN0npDM468

item.title: Six Claude projects that all came from the same question: “why not?”
item.description: Six Claude projects that all came from the same question: “why not?”

item.title:
Kay Zhu is the co-founder and CTO of @genspark_ai, the all-in-one AI workspace built on Claude.
In a market moving this fast, where anyone can build, he thinks the team is what makes the difference:
item.description:
Kay Zhu is the co-founder and CTO of @genspark_ai, the all-in-one AI workspace built on Claude.
In a market moving this fast, where anyone can build, he thinks the team is what makes the difference: https://t.co/1fdpKpxjqj

item.description: Tinkering, prototyping, and seeing what happens with Claude Design:

item.title:
Scott Wu (@ScottWu46) runs @cognition, the team behind Devin, an AI software engineer built on Claude.
He wants to make building software 10x faster for every engineering team: https://t.co/5AKOp2vX
item.description:

item.title: Live from Code with Claude London: we're launching self-hosted sandboxes (public beta) and MCP tunnels (research preview) in Claude Managed Agents. Run agents inside your own perimeter, with your secu
item.description: Live from Code with Claude London: we're launching self-hosted sandboxes (public beta) and MCP tunnels (research preview) in Claude Managed Agents. Run agents inside your own perimeter, with your security controls applied by default. https://t.co/cxvmk3feHp

item.title:
You can now create more with Claude Design.
We've doubled token limits across every plan. https://t.co/d2AemkZUxW
item.description:

item.description:

item.title:
The Claude Platform on AWS is now generally available.
AWS customers get the full set of Claude API features, with AWS authentication, billing, and commitment retirement. https://t.co/9WPrEgCpkg
item.description:

AWS customers get the full set of Claude API features, with AWS authentication, billing, and commitment retirement. https://t.co/9WPrEgCpkg

item.title:
Claude for Excel, PowerPoint, and Word are now generally available, and Claude for Outlook is in public beta.
As Claude moves between your Microsoft apps, it carries the full context of your conversa
item.description:
Claude for Excel, PowerPoint, and Word are now generally available, and Claude for Outlook is in public beta.
As Claude moves between your Microsoft apps, it carries the full context of your conversation. https://t.co/l8oOcoFcHg

item.title:
Join us at 1pm PT for a conversation with our co-founders Dario Amodei and Daniela Amodei, moderated by Chief Product Officer Ami Vora.
https://t.co/InUxTaNimb
item.description:
Join us at 1pm PT for a conversation with our co-founders Dario Amodei and Daniela Amodei, moderated by Chief Product Officer Ami Vora.
https://t.co/InUxTaNimb

item.title:
Live from Code with Claude: we're launching dreaming in Claude Managed Agents as a research preview.
Outcomes, multiagent orchestration, and webhooks are now in public beta. https://t.co/p4DFRzFEd8
item.description:
Live from Code with Claude: we're launching dreaming in Claude Managed Agents as a research preview.
Outcomes, multiagent orchestration, and webhooks are now in public beta. https://t.co/p4DFRzFEd8

item.title:
We’ve agreed to a partnership with @SpaceX that will substantially increase our compute capacity.
This, along with our other recent compute deals, means that we’ve been able to increase our usage lim
item.description:
We’ve agreed to a partnership with @SpaceX that will substantially increase our compute capacity.
This, along with our other recent compute deals, means that we’ve been able to increase our usage limits for Claude Code and the Claude API.

item.title:
RT @ClaudeDevs: Code with Claude is happening now!
▪︎ 9:00AM - Keynote ▪︎ 10:30AM - What's new in Claude Code ▪︎ 11:15AM - Building on C…
item.description:
RT @ClaudeDevs: Code with Claude is happening now!
▪︎ 9:00AM - Keynote ▪︎ 10:30AM - What's new in Claude Code ▪︎ 11:15AM - Building on C…

item.title:
New for financial services: ready-to-run Claude agent templates for building pitches, conducting valuation reviews, closing the books at month-end, and more.
Install them as plugins in Cowork and Cla
item.description:
New for financial services: ready-to-run Claude agent templates for building pitches, conducting valuation reviews, closing the books at month-end, and more.
Install them as plugins in Cowork and Claude Code, or use our cookbooks to run them in production as Managed Agents. https://t.co/Nzj4Feaaz2

item.title:
Code with Claude, our developer conference, returns next week.
Whether you're just getting started with Claude Code or you've been building for a while, there's a session for you.
Register for the l
item.description:
Code with Claude, our developer conference, returns next week.
Whether you're just getting started with Claude Code or you've been building for a while, there's a session for you.
Register for the livestream: https://t.co/GJwOPMDLEC https://t.co/uwAZgWPu7F
